bugs.error_message: Missing error handling in unknown
bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught
bugs.fix: Added try/catch block

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. Use with `
bugs.fix: Changed to 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. **Always use `

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 5 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 20→49 lines (5 removed)

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. **Always use `
bugs.fix: Changed to 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. Iterate with `

bugs.error_message: Node jobs with dead PID entered waiting/recovery_pending causing wait-phase stalls
bugs.root_cause: Dead-PID handlers branched on node_id and mapped node jobs to waiting/recovery_pending instead of terminal error
bugs.fix: Unified dead-PID handling in detached watchdog and crashRecovery to always set status=error with message and last_event_at_ms; added node_id regression test

bugs.error_message: specialists init rejected flattened .xtrm/skills/active layout
bugs.root_cause: init hardcoded legacy active/claude and active/pi roots in symlink validation, installation, and help text after xt installer flattened active/
bugs.fix: switched init to flattened active root only, updated active symlink wiring/validation/help text, and updated unit+integration tests

bugs.error_message: Published package still enforced active/claude because dist/index.js was stale
bugs.root_cause: Source fix landed in src/cli/init.ts but release published without rebuilding bundled dist, so CLI behavior on npm remained old
bugs.fix: Rebuild dist/index.js before release, verify bundled output strings, then bump patch and republish

bugs.error_message: specialists init aborted on legacy .pi/.claude skill root symlinks after flattened active migration
bugs.root_cause: validator accepted only exact flattened target and did not auto-rewire repos still pointing at active/pi or active/claude
bugs.fix: legacy root symlinks are now rewritten in place to flattened active root during init; tests cover both .pi and .claude cases

bugs.error_message: sp init --sync-defaults left stale files in .specialists/default unchanged
bugs.root_cause: existing canonical specialist and node config files were skipped instead of refreshed during explicit sync
bugs.fix: copyCanonicalSpecialists and copyCanonicalNodeConfigs now overwrite existing canonical files during --sync-defaults; regression tests added

bugs.error_message: Executor verification path attempted vitest/bun tests and job died before completion
bugs.root_cause: I treated executor verification like a normal local test step instead of following the project rule that executors do not use Bun/Vitest here.
bugs.fix: Do not request vitest or bun test commands from executors; restrict executor verification to lint/tsc and run tests through reviewer/test-runner or manual follow-up outside the executor path.

bugs.error_message: MEDIUM/HIGH specialist --bead runs die at startup with status=starting/dead and no feed/events; foreground shows existing undefined job 'undefined' already active
bugs.root_cause: SqliteClient.claimJobStart transaction wrapper returned Bun db.transaction(callback) function without invoking it, so Supervisor received a function instead of ClaimJobStartResult and threw before run_start persistence.
bugs.fix: Invoke the Bun transaction wrapper with this.db.transaction(callback)(); added real SQLite regression proving claimJobStart persists status and run_start.

bugs.error_message: validate-specialist helper failed from project root with Cannot find module ../../../src/specialist/schema.ts
bugs.root_cause: helper lived one directory deeper than its relative import assumed; scaffold helper used ../../../../src while validator used ../../../src
bugs.fix: changed parseSpecialist import to ../../../../src/specialist/schema.ts and verified bundled validator against security-auditor, code-sanity, and explorer configs

bugs.error_message: sp doctor/status from published v3.12.0 crashed with Cannot find module '../../package.json' from dist/index.js and security-auditor shipped machine-local optional skill paths
bugs.root_cause: Bundled dist runs one directory shallower than src/cli, so ../../package.json points outside the npm package; security-auditor config used absolute dev-machine xtrm optional skill paths instead of repo-relative paths.
bugs.fix: Version check now tries both ../package.json and ../../package.json with safe fallback; security-auditor optional skills now use .xtrm/skills/optional/... relative paths; v3.13.0 release verifies installed sp doctor no longer fatals.

bugs.error_message: script-runner pi calls leaked CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/skills/prompt templates/themes into script-class specialist prompts
bugs.root_cause: runSingleAttempt used pi isolation flags for session/tools/extensions only; pi still auto-discovered project context files, skills, prompt templates, and themes after --system-prompt.
bugs.fix: Added --no-context-files --no-skills --no-prompt-templates --no-themes to script-runner pi argv, rebuilt dist/index.js, and added a regression test asserting the flags.

bugs.error_message: script-runner passed rendered task prompts as pi argv, exposing prompt text in process lists and risking CLI misparse for -- or @-prefixed content
bugs.root_cause: runSingleAttempt appended the rendered prompt to the pi argument array and spawned pi with stdin ignored.
bugs.fix: Removed prompt from argv, spawned pi with stdin pipe, wrote the rendered prompt to stdin, closed stdin, swallowed stdin EPIPE/error events, rebuilt dist, and added regression tests for argv absence, stdin write/end, and stdin error handling.

bugs.error_message: sp serve emitted no per-request operational logs for POST /v1/generate
bugs.root_cause: HTTP serve route only printed startup readiness text and relied on observability.db audit rows, leaving stdout/stderr empty during production traffic.
bugs.fix: Added structured non-PII generate logging with trace_id, specialist, resolved_specialist, model, status/error_type, duration_ms, prompt_bytes, short error, and --log-level off|info|debug; added integration coverage.

bugs.error_message: Uncommitted xtrm hook drift would clear memory-gate sentinel and remove DB-first specialist completion metadata lookup
bugs.root_cause: Generated/uncommitted hook refresh regressed repo-local fixes while the latest report had not captured newer reviewer evidence commits.
bugs.fix: Backed up dirty patches, reverted unsafe hook changes to HEAD, preserved intentional dist/report/changelog/beads/GitNexus context updates, and documented cleanup in report.

bugs.error_message: sp ps System health showed OK while dolt=27 and orphans=6 during unitAI-uof0t manual validation
bugs.root_cause: Health severity only considered RSS thresholdPct and ignored Dolt sql-server count and orphan count, despite the bead contract requiring Dolt >1 to surface as a regression alert.
bugs.fix: Added ProcessHealthReport.status/statusReasons; status becomes WARN for doltCount >1 or orphanCount >0 and ps renders alert reasons. Added unit coverage and manual ps validation.

bugs.error_message: sp ps showed 26 terminal historical jobs after sp clean and sp clean --reap-orphans reported clean
bugs.root_cause: Default ps visibility included terminal jobs inside non-terminal/derived epic groups, so DB history rendered even with 0 running and 0 waiting jobs.
bugs.fix: Changed default ps filter to active states only; --include-terminal and --all retain terminal history access. Added ps tests and rebuilt dist.

bugs.error_message: Active-only sp ps default hid failed/error terminal runs and removed observability into unresolved problems
bugs.root_cause: The previous fix over-corrected terminal-history noise by hiding all terminal jobs by default instead of introducing explicit dashboard cleanup/acknowledgement semantics.
bugs.fix: Default ps now shows active jobs plus unresolved error/cancelled terminal rows; sp clean --ps soft-hides terminal rows with ps_hidden_at/ps_hidden_reason metadata; --include-cleaned and --all show hidden audit history.

bugs.error_message: sp ps health reported specialists=45+ with no active jobs because process-health counted MCP/Serena/GitNexus/tsserver/shell tooling as specialist processes
bugs.root_cause: process-health classifyProcess used broad substring matching for specialists/serena/gitnexus and cwd under .worktrees, so developer tooling and shell wrappers were aggregated under specialistCount.
bugs.fix: Refined classification to count only direct specialists/sp run commands and pi-coding-agent processes as specialist processes; non-deleted MCP/tsserver helpers are excluded, deleted-cwd tool leaks remain reapable; ps now rejects unknown flags such as --ps with a sp clean --ps hint.

bugs.error_message: sp ps -f leaked ANSI cursor/color escapes into pipes and repainted every second in the main terminal buffer
bugs.root_cause: Follow mode treated stdout as an interactive terminal unconditionally, used cursor-home/clear-down escape sequences without a TTY guard, repainted unchanged frames, and only restored cursor state through an exit handler.
bugs.fix: Follow mode now branches on process.stdout.isTTY: TTY uses alternate screen plus hidden cursor and in-place redraw with unchanged-frame dedupe; non-TTY appends ANSI-free snapshots. Cleanup handles SIGINT/SIGTERM/exit and EPIPE, and dist was rebuilt.

bugs.error_message: README and docs drifted after v3.14-v3.15 releases, leaving stale onboarding commands, specialist names, model examples, default-mirror guidance, and broken/retired doc links.
bugs.root_cause: Several release waves changed package-canonical defaults, xtrm-tools prerequisites, specialist roster/models, sync-docs scope, DB-first runtime behavior, and service deployment docs faster than top-level docs were reconciled.
bugs.fix: Reviewed recent releases, PR/release notes, .xtrm reports, CHANGELOG, and drift scan output; refreshed README and high-traffic docs; stamped reviewed docs to current sync point; verified drift_detector count 0 and local markdown links all resolve.

bugs.error_message: PR #80 OSV scan failed before scanning with “Unable to resolve action google/osv-scanner-action@v2, unable to find version v2”.
bugs.root_cause: The OSV workflow used the floating tag @v2, but google/osv-scanner-action currently publishes concrete v2.x tags and no v2 alias, so GitHub Actions could not resolve the action.
bugs.fix: Pinned the live workflow and reusable security-pipeline template to google/osv-scanner-action/osv-scanner-action@v2.3.8.

bugs.error_message: After syncing bun.lock to package.json Vitest 4.1.6 during OSV remediation, `bun run test` failed with 90 failed tests and 2 unhandled EBADF close errors.
bugs.root_cause: The committed package.json already requested Vitest 4.1.6 while the previous bun.lock still resolved Vitest 2.x; making the lockfile consistent exposes test-suite incompatibilities with Vitest 4 and existing expectation drift.
bugs.fix: Not fixed in the security PR; created follow-up bead unitAI-rlq48. Lint, build, frozen install, and OSV scan pass for unitAI-4r9sf.

bugs.error_message: PR #80 OSV scan failed after JS remediation because OSV action v2.3.8 resolved unpinned requirements.txt to vulnerable requests 2.9.2, pillow 9.5.0, and zipp 3.9.1.
bugs.root_cause: requirements.txt listed Python packages without minimum safe versions, so the OSV action dependency resolver selected vulnerable historical versions/transitives even though the local older OSV CLI did not report them.
bugs.fix: Pinned requests>=2.33.0, pillow>=12.2.0, and zipp>=3.19.1; verified with ghcr.io/google/osv-scanner-action:v2.3.8 locally.

bugs.error_message: Dependabot Docker/GitHub Actions PR smoke jobs failed during Docker build with Module not found /app/scripts/generate-asset-contract.mjs.
bugs.root_cause: The Docker builder stage copied package metadata and src but not config/ or scripts/generate-asset-contract.mjs after the build script began generating dist/asset-contract.json.
bugs.fix: Updated Dockerfile builder context to copy config/ and scripts/generate-asset-contract.mjs before bun run build; verified docker build and container /healthz smoke locally.

bugs.error_message: Dependabot PR #86 zod ^4.4.3 fails `bun run lint` with ZodEffects and Zod issue API/type errors.
bugs.root_cause: Zod 4 changed/removed APIs and typings used by the current Zod 3-oriented schema editing and error-formatting code; zod-to-json-schema integration remains typed around Zod 3.
bugs.fix: Not fixed during Dependabot triage; PR #86 closed and migration tracked as unitAI-a5ys3.

bugs.error_message: Dependabot PR #88 typescript ^6.0.3 fails `bun run lint` broadly with missing Node/Bun ambient types and stricter possibly-undefined checks.
bugs.root_cause: TypeScript 6 changes type resolution/checking enough that the current tsconfig/types setup no longer exposes Node/Bun globals as expected and stricter diagnostics surface additional code issues.
bugs.fix: Not fixed during Dependabot triage; PR #88 closed and migration tracked as unitAI-ib5xc.

bugs.error_message: specialists release-gate failed on master at repository_dispatch with 'Resource not accessible by personal access token'.
bugs.root_cause: The specialists repo secret held a token that could not create repository_dispatch events on Jaggerxtrm/xtrm-tools, and the sender payload used sha/tag while the xtrm-tools receiver expected specialists_sha/specialists_tag/specialists_package_version.
bugs.fix: Refreshed XTRM_TOOLS_DISPATCH_PAT using the repo-scoped gh token, changed release-gate client-payload keys to match the xtrm-tools receiver, added package version output, and verified a repository_dispatch run in xtrm-tools completed successfully.

bugs.error_message: sp chat TUI emitted terminal mode escapes but rendered no visible feed/status/input in real terminals.
bugs.root_cause: chat.ts assigned a non-API tui.root property instead of adding the component tree with tui.addChild(root), started launchSpecialist before the first TUI render could flush, and the smoke harness only asserted generic ANSI takeover markers.
bugs.fix: Mount the root component via tui.addChild(root), force/yield one render before launching the specialist, route feed updates through requestRender, strengthen smoke assertions for visible feed and input cursor, and make smoke cleanup memory-gate aware.

bugs.error_message: sp chat rendered specialist activity as noisy assistant:-prefixed raw deltas instead of matching sp run/sp feed.
bugs.root_cause: ChatFeed subscribed directly to launchSpecialist onProgress, which streams raw token/thinking/tool deltas, then wrapped each chunk with appendEvent("assistant", ...).
bugs.fix: Chat now tails the job events.jsonl and formats events with formatEventInlineDebounced, matching sp run human-mode presentation and suppressing assistant: prefixes; smoke asserts the prefix is absent.

bugs.error_message: sp chat feed printed repeated THINK/TEXT event lines continuously and did not surface startup context or final run output like sp feed/sp result.
bugs.root_cause: The chat timeline tailer reused formatEventLine but did not copy sp feed event-key dedupe/context-side-line behavior, and it rendered run_complete only as an event summary without output.
bugs.fix: Added sp feed-style event-key dedupe, startup context side-lines for run_start/payload/mandatory rules/memory events, and run_complete.output rendering so chat behaves as a feed/result hybrid.

bugs.error_message: bd create description was corrupted because markdown backticks in a double-quoted shell argument triggered command substitution (sp help, sp attach, build output executed/inlined).
bugs.root_cause: Used inline double-quoted bash text for markdown containing backticks instead of passing arguments safely.
bugs.fix: Rewrote the bead description via Python subprocess argument passing; added Do-Not-Repeat guidance to use subprocess args or body files for markdown/code snippets.

bugs.error_message: sp chat Ctrl+C stopped the job and /quit did not reliably exit the shell/TUI; /show parsed but had no useful implementation.
bugs.root_cause: Ctrl+C was wired to stopJobAndExit, coupling detach with job cancellation. /quit only resolved the local race and could leave foreground runner handles alive. /show fell through to a generic requested message.
bugs.fix: Route Ctrl+C and /quit through a detach path that restores TUI and exits without stopJob, add stdin fallback for slash commands after raw-mode acquisition, implement /show status output, and keep /stop as the explicit stop path.

bugs.error_message: Bare sp attach list could not be navigated/selected with arrow keys.
bugs.root_cause: The bare attach picker printed a numeric list and blocked on readFileSync(0), so it had no raw-mode keypress handling for Up/Down/Enter despite being presented as an interactive list.
bugs.fix: Replaced numeric stdin reader with readline keypress picker supporting Up/Down cycling, Enter selection, Ctrl+C cancel, numeric shortcuts, and added regression coverage plus PTY smoke.

bugs.error_message: Specialist reviewer/code-sanity/cancelled/error jobs lacked a complete operator-visible runtime log for crash/stop/resume/steer provenance
bugs.root_cause: Compact feed suppressed many lifecycle details and stop/resume/steer paths updated status/FIFO without durable control-signal timeline events; cancelled jobs had no result output and no log hint.
bugs.fix: Added control_signal timeline events, status_change persistence for updateJobStatus, sp log snapshot/follow command with bead/repo/path metadata, result cancelled/error log hints, docs/help/tests, and rebuilt dist.
